evidence_verified: status/codex WAITING_REVIEW points to exact feature SHA
implementation report exists at the feature head
control ownership map exists at the feature head
six dedicated widget IDs and bodies exist

findings.title: Escape can commit edited Inspector/Table content instead of cancelling
findings.reason: Escape resets local state and immediately blurs; onBlur commit can execute before the restored canonical draft renders, committing the edited Name/Area/Body and creating history instead of cancelling. AreaCell also commits event.target.value during the Escape-triggered blur.
findings.test_gap: Current M1 product contracts check source-string presence but do not execute the cancel/blur state machine.

findings.title: Inspector header scope badge falsely labels selection as Local or Mixed
findings.reason: The header label derives Local/Mixed only from selection count, not canonical inheritance or actual mixed values.

next_gate: Same Codex session corrects the existing M1 branch, pushes a new fixed head, updates status/codex to WAITING_REVIEW and stops. No merge and no M2.
